title: agrimonia eupatoria var. repens
intro: Agrimonia eupatoria var. repens, also known as creeping agrimony, is a lesser-known variety of agrimony, a perennial herb native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for wound healing and treatment of digestive issues. The health benefits of creeping agrimony include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support immune function. Creeping agrimony can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
